mapper.select: select jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, status, phase, threadcnt, commitcnt, DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as enddate, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5 from cotdl.tbl_piistep a where version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid = a.jobid and stepid = a.stepid ) order by jobid, stepseq
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piistep (jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, status, phase, threadcnt, commitcnt, enddate, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{steptype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepseq}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{threadcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{commitcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, str_to_date(#{enddate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%Y/%m/%d'), NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{data_handling_method, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processing_method, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fk_disable_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{index_unusual_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val5, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piistep set phase= 'APPROVING', upddate= NOW() where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piistep set phase= 'CHECKOUT', upddate= NOW() where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piistep set phase= 'CHECKIN', upddate= NOW() where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piistep (jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, status, phase, threadcnt, commitcnt, enddate, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{steptype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepseq}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{threadcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{commitcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, str_to_date(#{enddate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%Y/%m/%d'), NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{data_handling_method, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processing_method, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fk_disable_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{index_unusual_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val5, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, status, phase, threadcnt, commitcnt, DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as enddate, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5 from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and steptype in ('EXE_DELETE', 'EXE_UPDATE')
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and steptype= #{steptype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid}
delete from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piistep set stepname= #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, steptype= #{steptype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stepseq= #{stepseq, jdbcType=INTEGER}, db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phase= #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, threadcnt= #{threadcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, commitcnt= #{commitcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enddate= null, upddate= NOW(), reguserid= #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upduserid= #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_handling_method= #{data_handling_method, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, processing_method= #{processing_method, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fk_disable_flag= #{fk_disable_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, index_unusual_flag= #{index_unusual_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, val1= #{val1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, val2= #{val2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, val3= #{val3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, val4= #{val4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, val5= #{val5, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update cotdl.tbl_piistep set status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where (jobid, version) in (select jobid, max(cast(version as INTEGER)) version from cotdl.tbl_piijob where policy_id= #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and status='ACTIVE' group by jobid) and steptype= 'EXE_ARCHIVE'
mapper.select:
select jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, status, phase, threadcnt, commitcnt, DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as enddate, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid , data_handling_method, processing_method, fk_disable_flag, index_unusual_flag, val1, val2, val3, val4, val5 from cotdl.tbl_piistep
order by jobid, stepseq limit #{offset}, #{amount}
select COALESCE(max(stepseq),0)+1 from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
